summary: Completed security testing for ETI Educom website. All security features verified: JWT auth on admin endpoints (33/33 backend tests passed), rate limiting on login (5/minute), security headers present, SVG upload rejected, public endpoints still accessible without auth.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py is very large (3900+ lines) - consider splitting into separate route modules for maintainability

success_rate.frontend: 100% (admin login, JWT token storage, admin operations all working)

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for contact, quick enquiry, and review - used for security testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All security features tested and working. Rate limiting is active (5/minute on login) - may need to wait 60 seconds between test runs if hitting rate limits.

jwt_authentication.details: Admin login returns JWT token, stored in sessionStorage, sent with all admin API calls via adminFetch helper

admin_endpoints_protected.details: All admin CRUD endpoints (blogs, events, reviews, partners, team, programs) return 401 without JWT token

rate_limiting.details: Login endpoint has 5/minute rate limit - verified via 429 response after multiple attempts

security_headers.details: X-Frame-Options: DENY, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy all present

svg_upload_rejected.details: SVG files rejected with 400 error - 'File type .svg not allowed'

frontend_jwt_integration.details: Admin panel stores JWT in sessionStorage, adminFetch helper sends Bearer token with all admin operations
